name: Andiamo Corporation
summary: Andiamo Corporation, through its subsidiaries, provides prepackaged software services. It provides mobile applications through the Apple iTunes App Store and the Google Android market in approximately 80 countries. The company was formerly known as Title Consulting Services, Inc. and changed its name to Andiamo Corporation in June 2011. Andiamo Corporation was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Lansing, Michigan.
